Source URL: https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/default.asp

# UH APEX Accelerator Home

## Resource type
Local government procurement advising/training program.

## Resource summary
Use for existing for-profit businesses seeking education and guidance for selling to federal, state, and local government. Includes one-on-one advising, training, program model, advisor request, government resources, disaster recovery contracting, cybersecurity information, and on-demand webinars.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
